title: Workprint Observation
description: Canonical normalized observation produced by evidence adapters and consumed by the investigation engine.

source_type.description: Machine-friendly evidence category, such as conversation, commit, document, design, calendar, or time_record.

source_locator.description: Stable locator back to the source record, when available.

observed_at.description: When the evidence was collected or observed by Workprint.

event_time.description: When the underlying project event occurred, if known.

activity.description: Normalized activity such as question, suggestion, evaluation, decision, adoption, rejection, implementation, drafting, review, or validation.

observation.description: Concise factual statement supported by the referenced source evidence.

metadata.description: Source-specific adapter metadata that the core engine does not interpret.
